# Willis & Associates Family Dentistry — Charlottesville

> Willis & Associates Family Dentistry, led by Dr. Sowmya Karamcheti (DDS, MHA), is a family and cosmetic dental practice at 2375 Commonwealth Dr # A, Charlottesville, VA 22901. The practice offers in-house dental implants (no referral needed), Invisalign, cosmetic dentistry, emergency dental care, and comprehensive general dentistry. Same-day appointments available. Phone: (434) 973-5873.

## Services

- [Dental Implants](https://cvilledentist.com/dental-implants-charlottesville): In-house implant placement and restoration. No referral to an oral surgeon. Single implants, implant-supported bridges, and full-arch restorations.
- [Invisalign](https://cvilledentist.com/invisalign-charlottesville): Clear aligner treatment for adults and teens. Free smile assessments available.
- [Cosmetic Dentistry](https://cvilledentist.com/cosmetic-dentistry-charlottesville): Porcelain veneers, dental bonding, teeth whitening, and smile makeovers.
- [Emergency Dentistry](https://cvilledentist.com/emergency-dentist-charlottesville): Same-day emergency appointments. Toothaches, broken teeth, knocked-out teeth, lost crowns, abscesses. After-hours line: 434-922-0340.
- [General Dentistry](https://cvilledentist.com/general-dentistry-charlottesville): Cleanings, exams, fillings, crowns, bridges, extractions, night guards, oral cancer screenings.
- [Virginia Dental Club](https://cvilledentist.com/virginia-dental-club): In-house dental membership plan for uninsured patients. Covers cleanings, exams, X-rays, plus discounts on all treatment.

## About

- [About Dr. Karamcheti](https://cvilledentist.com/about): Dr. Sowmya Karamcheti holds a DDS and MHA. Known for warm chairside manner, precision dentistry, and making anxious patients feel at ease.
- [New Patients](https://cvilledentist.com/new-patients): What to expect on your first visit. Insurance information. Same-day availability.
- [Contact](https://cvilledentist.com/contact): 2375 Commonwealth Dr # A, Charlottesville, VA 22901. Phone: (434) 973-5873. Monday–Thursday 8 AM – 5 PM.

## Key Facts

- In-house dental implants — placement and restoration by the same doctor, no referral needed
- Same-day appointments for new patients and emergencies
- Virginia Dental Club membership plan for patients without insurance
- Serving Charlottesville, Ivy, Crozet, and surrounding areas in Virginia
- Dr. Karamcheti holds dual credentials: Doctor of Dental Surgery (DDS) and Master of Health Administration (MHA)
